g.aria-label: X-axis titled 'Date' for a discrete scale with 14 values: 01-23, 01-24, 01-25, 01-26, 01-27, ending with 02-05
Y-axis titled 'Views' for a linear scale with values from 0 to 450
Symbol legend for fill color with 5 values: onshape-robotics-toolkit, TMotorCANControl, neurobionicspi, opensourceleg, anton
